recentWork.title: Fixed 4 blockers + 2 additional fixes (costUsd bigint, missing client component)
recentWork.summary: Fixed auth bypass, rate limiting, zod validation, migration tables. Additional: changed costUsd from integer to bigint to prevent overflow, created missing trust-scores-client.tsx component with tRPC router for trust score data display

recentWork.title: Archive Dormant Repos
recentWork.summary: Archived 3 dormant repos: llmtrust-monorepo, llmtrust-chat, llmtrust-back
